body.value: 藩制一覧表第九 （鶴田、名古屋）
藩制一覧表 第九冊（鶴田藩・名古屋藩）

Running page header in the outer (right) margin: Domain Survey table, ninth fascicle (officials-and-military register), covering the Tsuruta and Nagoya sections. Provenance, not data. The printed page number 三百六十二 (362) sits lower in this same outer margin (x2154-2203, y3143-3384). Box widened left to x2062 to enclose the full glyph column (ink x2062-2212, y1292-2035) without clipping; the vertical rule at ~x2050 is the page frame, excluded.
Page header (provenance)
校正者曰 重複ナルモ姓名記載ニ付省略セス
校正者曰く、重複なるも姓名の記載につき省略せず

Proofreader's editorial note (5 vertical sub-columns, read right-to-left): （校正者曰｜重複ナルモ｜姓名記載ニ｜付省略セ｜ス）. 'The proofreader states: although duplicated, since the personal names are recorded, [they are] not abbreviated.' Verified glyph-by-glyph; ink bbox x1698-1960, y686-937.
(Tsuruta) proofreader's note
○鶴田藩
○鶴田藩（つるたはん）

Domain-boundary marker for Tsuruta (鶴田藩, Hizen) — the maru plus 鶴/田/藩 read top-to-bottom. Crane-domain disambiguation confirmed at high zoom: this is 鶴田 (Tsuruta), NOT 鶴舞 (Tsurumai) or 鶴牧 (Tsurumaki). Ink bbox x2013-2103, y1376-1919.
(Tsuruta) boundary marker ○鶴田藩
大参事
大参事（だいさんじ）
Tsuruta rank heading: Senior Councillor (dai-sanji), atop the rightmost Tsuruta name column. Ink x1888-1956, y1044-1272.
(Tsuruta) 大参事 heading
権大参事
権大参事（ごんだいさんじ）
Tsuruta rank heading: Provisional Senior Councillor (gon-dai-sanji). Ink x1752-1819.
(Tsuruta) 権大参事 heading
少参事
少参事（しょうさんじ）
Tsuruta rank heading: Junior Councillor (sho-sanji). Ink x1615-1683.
(Tsuruta) 少参事 heading
権少参事
権少参事（ごんしょうさんじ）
Tsuruta rank heading: Provisional Junior Councillor (gon-sho-sanji), the leftmost of Tsuruta's four rank columns; note the wide gap (x1415-1615) to its right before 少参事. Ink x1346-1415.
(Tsuruta) 権少参事 heading
尾關秀／伊藤三郎・野島亨／河鯔新・寺田與／河村弘・岡尾靖／岡村郡太・奥津實
鶴田藩の役人名（各列に上下二名）— 尾關秀／伊藤三郎、野島亨／河鯔新、寺田與／河村弘、岡尾靖／岡村郡太、奥津實

Tsuruta's five named-appointee columns under the four rank headings, each column carrying two stacked names (the duplication the proofreader flagged). Ink bbox x1336-1948, y2052-3545 — the names begin at y~2052, with ~450px of blank space above (between the headings at y~1325 and the first name), so the box starts at the name ink, not the heading band. Several given-name glyphs are abraded; readings approximate.
(Tsuruta) appointee-name columns
服部傳／伊藤篤歳
服部傳（はっとり でん）／伊藤篤歳（いとう あつとし）

The leftmost Tsuruta name column, 服部傳 over 伊藤篤歳. It prints to the RIGHT of the ○名古屋藩 boundary marker, so by HI layout it belongs to the PREVIOUS domain (Tsuruta), NOT to Nagoya — an official's name overflowing past the next domain's marker. Ink bbox x1207-1275, y2057-3543; box tightened down from the old y1545 (which sat in ~500px of whitespace above the names).
(Tsuruta) 服部傳 name column (right of Nagoya marker)
○名古屋藩
○名古屋藩（なごやはん）

Domain-boundary marker for Nagoya (Owari-Tokugawa): ○名古屋藩 read top-to-bottom (○/名/古/屋/藩). Ink bbox x1065-1151, y1384-1973. Everything LEFT of this marker is Nagoya; the 服部傳 column immediately to its right is Tsuruta's tail.
Nagoya boundary marker ○名古屋藩
大参事 二人
大参事（だいさんじ）二人
Nagoya — Senior Councillors (dai-sanji): 2 men. Value 二人 verified digit-by-digit. Ink x943-1012, y1046-1610 (heading 大参事 top, 二人 below). Nagoya's officials are headcounts only, no names.
Nagoya 大参事 二人
権大参事 六人
権大参事（ごんだいさんじ）六人
Nagoya — Provisional Senior Councillors (gon-dai-sanji): 6 men. Value 六人 verified. Ink x808-879, y1045-1611.
Nagoya 権大参事 六人
少参事 五人
少参事（しょうさんじ）五人
Nagoya — Junior Councillors (sho-sanji): 5 men. Value 五人 verified. Ink x673-743, y1049-1614.
Nagoya 少参事 五人
権少参事 十一人
権少参事（ごんしょうさんじ）十一人
Nagoya — Provisional Junior Councillors (gon-sho-sanji): 11 men. Value 十一人 verified (this count band runs lower, to y~1702). Ink x539-606, y1049-1702. Leftmost of Nagoya's four rank columns.
Nagoya 権少参事 十一人
兵隊
兵隊（へいたい）

Nagoya military-section heading: 兵隊 (troops), two glyphs 兵 over 隊, sitting above the two self-labelled troop columns to its left/below. Confirmed present on the scan at ink bbox x410-470, y1047-1195 (it is NOT absent). It is the parent heading over 士族兵 and 卒族兵; those two columns are separately boxed with their own labels and values.
Nagoya 兵隊 (military heading)
士族兵 二千四百八十人
士族兵（しぞくへい）二千四百八十人

Nagoya troops — shizoku (samurai-class) soldiers: 2,480 men (二千四百八十人, verified digit-by-digit: 二・千・四・百・八・十・人). The RIGHT of the two side-by-side troop columns under the 兵隊 heading. Self-labelled column (士族兵 title atop its own value); the 兵隊 parent heading is a separate box. Ink bbox x438-488, y1387-2051; shares its top with 卒族兵.
Nagoya 士族兵 (shizoku troops)
卒族兵 四千七百二十人
卒族兵（そつぞくへい）四千七百二十人

Nagoya troops — sotsu (foot-soldier-class) soldiers: 4,720 men (四千七百二十人, verified digit-by-digit: 四・千・七・百・二・十・人). The LEFT of the two troop columns; self-labelled (卒族兵 title atop its value). With shizoku 2,480 the total is 7,200. Ink bbox x386-444, y1385-2051; shares its top with 士族兵.
Nagoya 卒族兵 (sotsu troops)
